prerequisites: A running Adobe Commerce or Magento Open Source store reachable over HTTPS, whose hostname you supply as store_host.
Access to the store's Admin panel (or an admin user account) so you can obtain the bearer token used as api_key.
A start_date marking the earliest point from which records should be synced.
Optional: the REST API version segment (api_version, e.g. V1) if you need to pin a non-default version.

authMethods.name: Bearer token (api_key)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single token supplied as api_key and sent in the Authorization: Bearer header. Adobe Commerce token-based authentication issues this token to a registered admin (admin token) so the caller can reach admin-scoped REST web APIs over HTTPS.

authMethods.name: Integration access token
authMethods.summary: Alternatively, the api_key can be an integration access token. In the Admin, create an integration under System > Extension > Integration > Add New Integration, grant the needed Available APIs, then activate it. A self-activated integration produces an access token (plus consumer key/secret and access token secret) that can be used directly as the bearer token without calling the token endpoint.

setupSteps.title: Identify your store host
setupSteps.body: Set store_host to the hostname of your Adobe Commerce or Magento instance. REST calls are issued against https://<store_host>/rest/<store-view-code>/<endpoint>, so the host must be reachable over HTTPS.

setupSteps.title: Obtain a bearer token for api_key
setupSteps.body: Generate the token used as api_key. For an admin token, request one from the Magento token service with admin credentials. For an integration access token, in the Admin go to System > Extension > Integration > Add New Integration, grant the required Available APIs, save, then activate the integration to reveal its access token. Either token is sent in the Authorization: Bearer header.

setupSteps.title: Set the sync start date
setupSteps.body: Provide start_date as the earliest date from which the connector should pull records. Records older than this date are not synced.

setupSteps.title: Pin the API version if needed (optional)
setupSteps.body: If you need a specific REST version, set api_version (for example V1, the segment used in the /rest/<store-view-code>/V1/... path). Leave it unset to use the connector default.

sources.title: Getting Started with Adobe Commerce Web APIs
